plugin.name: Bilibili Danmaku Monitor
plugin.description: Monitor Bilibili live stream danmaku in real time, filter the feed, and push it to the AI for analysis and replies
panel.subtitle: Monitor Bilibili live stream danmaku in real-time.
panel.login.title: Bilibili Account
panel.login.desc: Scan QR code with the Bilibili App to unlock sending danmaku and advanced filters.
panel.login.error: Login operation failed, please try again
panel.login.qr.timeoutHint: QR code has expired. Please generate a new one.

panel.send.title: Send Danmaku

panel.settings.intervalHelp: How often to push danmaku to AI. Range: 5-180s
panel.bgLlm.title: Background LLM
panel.bgLlm.hint: Configure Background LLM in advanced settings to auto-summarize danmaku with AI.
panel.feed.title: Live Danmaku Feed
panel.feed.empty.title: Not Listening
panel.feed.empty.desc: Configure a room and click Start Listening first.
panel.feed.waiting.title: Waiting for Danmaku

entries.set_interval.description: Set the danmaku push interval in seconds
entries.send_danmaku.name: Send Danmaku

quickstart.title: Bilibili Danmaku Quickstart
quickstart.subtitle: Set up real-time Bilibili live stream danmaku monitoring in a few steps.
quickstart.steps.room.title: 1. Set Room ID
quickstart.steps.room.body: Enter your target Bilibili live room number and click Switch Room.
quickstart.steps.connect.title: 2. Connect
quickstart.steps.connect.body: Click Start Listening to connect to the danmaku server.
quickstart.steps.settings.title: 3. Configure Push Interval
quickstart.steps.settings.body: Adjust how often danmaku is pushed to AI (5-180 seconds).
quickstart.steps.login.title: 4. Login (Optional)
quickstart.steps.login.body: Login with your Bilibili account to unlock advanced features like sending danmaku and level-based filtering.
quickstart.tips.title: Tips
quickstart.tips.0: Guest mode can receive danmaku but cannot send or use advanced filters.
quickstart.tips.1: Background LLM can automatically summarize danmaku with AI.
quickstart.tips.2: The danmaku feed updates in real-time on the panel.
account.confirm_clear: Are you sure you want to clear the Bilibili credentials?
account.help_login_body: Scan the QR code with the Bilibili App to log in. After a successful login, your credentials are stored encrypted on this device.
account.help_security_body: Manual Cookie input is no longer offered, to avoid accidental leaks when copying sensitive cookies.
account.qr_scan_hint: Please scan the QR code with the Bilibili App to log in
account.title: Bilibili Account
ai.interval_hint: How often danmaku is pushed to the AI. 10-30 seconds is recommended
ai.master_uid_placeholder: Leave blank or 0 to leave unset
ai.max_len_hint: Bilibili limits danmaku to 20 characters; 20 is recommended
ai.target_ai_placeholder: Leave blank to leave unspecified, e.g. Xiaotian
ai.title: AI Push Settings
bgllm.disabled_hint: Configure the Cloud API below and connect, then enable
bgllm.knowledge_placeholder: e.g. {name} is a gentle cat-girl who loves milk tea, with the catchphrase "meow~". Gets shy when complimented...
bgllm.max_samples_hint: Maximum capacity of the danmaku sample pool
bgllm.neko_name_placeholder: e.g. Wanxuan, Xiaotian... leave blank to skip
bgllm.profile_placeholder: Describe the streamer/user persona used as LLM context...
bgllm.prompt_template_placeholder:
Custom System Prompt template; leave blank to use default.
Example: You are {name}, a cute cat-girl streamer.
Knowledge reference: {knowledge_context}
Generate guidance based on the danmaku.
bgllm.test_no_url: Please enter the API URL first
bgllm.title: Background LLM Settings
bgllm.window_hint: How many danmaku to accumulate before triggering one LLM filter call. Larger saves cost but slows responses
feed.empty: No danmaku yet, waiting for connection...
feed.title: Live Danmaku Feed

room.confirm_neko_send:
Confirm letting NEKO generate and send the live danmaku?

Streamer intent:
room.send_danmaku_placeholder: Enter the danmaku to send, or your reply intent for NEKO
room.send_hint: When "Let NEKO speak" is off, the input is sent directly. When on, the input and live room danmaku are handed to NEKO, who generates a reply using the persona and memory and then sends it.
room.send_neko_empty: Please enter the content to hand to NEKO
room.title: Room Settings
status.idle_sub: Enter a room ID and click Start
status.title: Connection Status
tool.author: Author
tool_result.title: Bilibili Tool Results
write_tools.confirm_neko: Confirm having NEKO generate persona-styled content and then run
write_tools.confirm_write_suffix: ? This will perform a write operation on Bilibili.
write_tools.danger_hint: Red buttons perform write operations on Bilibili. Please verify the content, account, and target before sending.
write_tools.images_placeholder: Local paths or URLs, separated by |
write_tools.neko_hint: When enabled, comments / posts / DMs are handed to NEKO and generated using the host persona and memory before being sent.
write_tools.rpid_placeholder: Fill in when replying to a comment
write_tools.text_placeholder: Text to send directly, or the intent for NEKO to phrase
